steps.name: Remove 'View All Properties' from Landing Page
steps.details: Removed 'View All Properties' button from landing page. Layout spacing maintained. Button no longer visible on home page.

steps.name: Reorder Landing Page Sections
steps.details: Moved Verified List, Quick Search, and Trusted Owners sections below property cards. Sections appear in correct order with smooth scroll animations.

steps.name: Saved Properties Animation (Guest + Logged-in)
steps.details: Implemented save/bookmark animation with scale, color fill, and checkmark. Toast notification with undo action. Guest mode uses localStorage with 'Demo Save' label. Logged-in mode persists to user profile. Respects prefers-reduced-motion. Counter increments on save.

steps.name: Payment Flow Page (User-Only; Guest Prompt to Login)
steps.details: Created comprehensive payment flow page with login gate for guests, booking summary, multiple payment methods (Card/UPI/NetBanking/Wallet), mock payment processor with initiate/confirm endpoints, escrow UI, booking states (pending/confirmed/cancelled), email confirmation mock, and backend-ready integration points with clear documentation for real gateway replacement.

steps.name: Back Button Labels & Dialog Changes
steps.details: Updated back buttons across all pages. Pages opened from home show 'Go back to Home' and navigate to '/'. Nested pages show 'Go back' with history.back() fallback. Applied to FindAccommodation, About, Privacy, Feedback, MapView, PropertyDetails, PaymentFlow, and other internal pages.

steps.name: UI Polish & Animations
steps.details: Added micro-animations (hover-lift on cards, smooth transitions, toast slide-in/out). Enhanced index.css with hover effects and reduced-motion support. Updated tailwind.config.ts with fade-in and slide-in keyframes. Improved color contrast using design system tokens. All animations respect accessibility (prefers-reduced-motion).

steps.name: Route & Link Testing
steps.details: Automated smoke tests completed. All routes functional. Hero placeholder loads instantly. 'View All Properties' confirmed absent. Section order correct. Save animation works for both guest and logged-in users with proper persistence. Payment flow blocks guests and processes mock payments for logged-in users. Back button labels and behavior correct on all tested pages. Responsive layouts maintained across mobile/tablet/desktop.

steps.name: Documentation & Dev Notes
steps.details: Created DEVNOTES.md with comprehensive documentation covering: mock payment API implementation and integration points, saved items persistence (guest vs logged-in), back button logic, accessibility features (reduced-motion, ARIA, keyboard nav), design system tokens and guidelines, demo data tagging, testing checklist, performance optimizations, environment variables, and future enhancements. Added migration notes for production gateway integration.

tests.name: Landing page loads with hero placeholder
tests.details: Hero image shimmer placeholder renders immediately, full image loads progressively

tests.name: 'View All Properties' button absent
tests.details: Button not found on landing page, layout remains balanced

tests.name: Section order correct (Properties → Verified → Quick → Trusted)
tests.details: All sections appear in specified order below property cards

tests.name: Save animation (guest mode)
tests.details: Click save triggers animation, toast with undo, localStorage updated with 'edustay_saved_properties' key

tests.name: Save animation (logged-in mode)
tests.details: Click save triggers animation, toast with undo, persists to user profile, counter increments

tests.name: Payment flow - guest blocking
tests.details: Guest user shown login modal when accessing payment page, cannot proceed without login

tests.name: Payment flow - logged-in user full flow
tests.details: Logged-in user can complete mock payment: initiate → confirm → success/failure → booking reference generated

tests.name: Payment methods UI
tests.details: All payment methods (Card/UPI/NetBanking/Wallet) selectable with proper input validation

tests.name: Escrow UI display
tests.details: Escrow message shown after successful payment confirmation

tests.name: Back button - 'Go back to Home' on direct pages
tests.details: FindAccommodation, About, Privacy, Feedback, MapView, PropertyDetails show 'Go back to Home' and navigate to '/'

tests.name: Back button - 'Go back' on nested pages
tests.details: PaymentFlow uses history.back() with fallback to home

tests.name: Design system - no direct colors
tests.details: All components use HSL tokens from index.css, no hardcoded colors found

tests.name: Documentation completeness
tests.details: DEVNOTES.md created with all required sections and migration instructions

notes: Mock payment integration ready for production gateway replacement
Accessibility features implemented (reduced-motion, ARIA, keyboard nav)
Back button behavior standardized across all pages
UI polish and animations enhance user experience
Code ready for production with clear migration path

productionReadinessChecklist.item: Replace mock payment gateway with real provider (Razorpay/Stripe)
Replace localStorage saved properties with API calls
Connect to real database for property listings
Add environment variables for API keys
Implement Google Maps integration for map view
